titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Tennis
Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Tennis
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 14, 2020 at 08:14

did.unittitle: Department of Athletics, Yale University, records documenting tennis
did.abstract: The records consist of scrapbooks, correspondence, memos, and reports documenting tennis at Yale.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 38-B (YRG 38-B), Records documenting specific sports at Yale.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Department of Athletics, 2005; gift of the Connecticut Historical Society, 2012.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is partially restricted. See inventory for details. Scrapbooks from 1918-1969 have been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 178 instead of the originals.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Patrons must use HM FILM 178 instead of the original scrapbooks for the years 1918-1969.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Tennis (RU 942). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of scrapbooks, correspondence, memos, and reports documenting tennis at Yale.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Scrapbooks for the years 1918-1975 are available on microfilm. Patrons must use HM FILM 178 instead of the original scrapbooks.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This material has been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 178 instead of the originals

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This material has been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 178 instead of the originals

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This material has been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 178 instead of the originals

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This material has been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 178 instead of the originals

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This material has been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 178 instead of the originals

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Scrapbooks for the years 1918-1975 are available on microfilm. Patrons must use HM FILM 178 instead of the original scrapbooks.

did.unittitle: Scrapbook of the Yale Tennis Association

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This accession consists of a scrapbook documenting activities of the Yale University Tennis Association and includes newspaper clippings and event programs.
